text:
"The den of lions."... Daniel was twice cast into the den of lions; one under Darius the Mede, because he had transgressed the king’s edict, by praying three times a day: and another time under Evilmerodach by a sedition of the people. This time he remained six days in the lions’ den; the other time only 
one night.

"Habacuc"... The same, as some think whose prophecy is found among the lesser prophets but others believe him to be 
different.
